title: Quantitative NMR interpretation without reference
author: Santana, Priscila Ivo Rubim de
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The publication describes the quantitative interpretation of the 1D Proton NMR experiment using only absolute signal intensities with the variation of common experimental parameters and their application. The data provided contains all NMR data (raw, processed and integrated) and the Apple Numbers v12.1 spreadsheet used for the interpretation and graph creation.
steps_raw: The publication describes the quantitative interpretation of the 1D Proton NMR experiment using only absolute signal intensities with the variation of common experimental parameters and their application. The data provided contains all NMR data (raw, processed and integrated) and the Apple Numbers v12.1 spreadsheet used for the interpretation and graph creation.
